summary: VenuLoQ simplified register, sticky CTA dark background, and UserCreate model update verified. All 3 fixes working correctly.

register_page_simplified.details: Register page shows only: Google button, email input, password input, Create Account button

register_no_name_field.details: Name field correctly NOT present on register page

register_no_phone_field.details: Phone field correctly NOT present on register page

register_no_role_dropdown.details: Role dropdown correctly NOT present on register page

register_no_confirm_password.details: Confirm password field correctly NOT present on register page

register_fits_one_screen_mobile.details: Document height 844px matches viewport (390x844) - no scrolling needed

register_api_email_password_only.details: POST /api/auth/register works with email+password only, name auto-derived from email prefix

login_page_works.details: Login page loads with Google + email/password, fits in one screen

sticky_cta_dark_background.details: Sticky CTA has rgb(11, 11, 13) = #0B0B0D dark obsidian background

sticky_cta_price_cream_text.details: Price text color is cream/white (rgb(244, 241, 236)) on dark background

connect_button_ghost_style.details: Connect button has transparent bg (rgba(0,0,0,0)) with cream border (rgba(244,241,236,0.2))

start_planning_button_gold.details: Start Planning button has gold background rgb(212, 179, 106) = #D4B36A

connect_callback_popup.details: Connect -> Request Callback opens popup with name+phone form

search_page_compact_cards.details: Search page shows 29 venue cards with ratings, prices, and area filters

context_for_next_testing_agent: Register page simplified: only email+password (no name, phone, role, confirm password). Backend auto-derives name from email prefix. Sticky CTA bar now has dark obsidian (#0B0B0D) background with cream text, gold Start Planning button, and ghost-style Connect button. All tests passing. Venue detail URLs follow pattern /venues/{city}/{slug}.
